visual: Drops into a very low side stance with one leg fully extended flat along the floor and hand sweeping along the inside of that leg — the creeping portion isolated from the rooster.
motion_description: Starting with the weight on the right leg and both arms raised high, the left foot steps laterally outward. The body continuously descends into a deep squat on the right leg, keeping the left leg fully extended horizontally. As the body drops, the left arm sweeps down and along the inside of the straight left leg toward the foot, while the right arm extends backward with a hooked wrist. The sequence concludes as the weight smoothly shifts forward onto the left leg to assume a forward bow stance, raising the torso while the left hand rises to push outward with an upright palm.
